metadata.name: Kalanfa
metadata.description: Multi-tenant offline-first school-management + digital-learning SaaS for francophone West Africa; independent MIT fork of Kolibri (Learning Equality).

evidence_labels.reported: executed earlier in history, not re-run

metadata.llm_summary: MIT fork of Kolibri (Django 3.2/DRF/morango/Vue2) rebranded kolibri->kalanfa. Tenant = Kolibri Facility. Plugin kalanfa.plugins.ecole holds nested Django app 'gestion' (label ecole_gestion) to avoid the dotted-plugin-app_label migration bug. 9 UUID+facility-FK models. DRF API /ecole/api/ facility-scoped, staff-only writes, custom actions bulletin/impayes/progression. Messaging via self-hosted Mattermost (team per facility) + Slack webhook + WhatsApp Cloud API connectors, env-configured. 29 mocked tests green.

architecture.style: Modular monolith (Django) + plugin system; server-rendered SPA (Vue 2) from Kolibri; optional external messaging services
architecture.backend: Django 3.2 + Django REST Framework + morango (offline sync)
architecture.multi_tenancy: Tenant = Kolibri Facility; every ecole record has FK facility; querysets filtered to request.user.facility; create force-assigns; cross-facility -> 404
architecture.plugin_pattern: Plugin shell (kalanfa.plugins.ecole) + nested ordinary Django app 'gestion' (label ecole_gestion) registered via plugin settings.py; explicit junction model instead of ManyToManyField
architecture.offline_first: Kolibri content channels + morango P2P/USB sync; degrade gracefully without Internet

messaging: WhatsApp Business Cloud API (Meta Graph v20)

modules.name: kalanfa.core (inherited Kolibri)
modules.responsibility: SIS, content, lessons, exams, attendance, auth/RBAC, device/facility, sync

modules.name: kalanfa.plugins.ecole
modules.responsibility: Plugin shell: URL mount /ecole/api/, settings registering the gestion app

modules.name: ecole_gestion
modules.responsibility: School-management data: models, serializers, viewsets, messaging, connectors, commands, tests

entities.name: DossierEleve
entities.notes: Fiche de renseignement: 1-1 FacilityUser; état civil, santé, scolarité antérieure, bourse/réduction

entities.name: Periode
entities.notes: annee_scolaire + nom (trimestre) + ordre; unique per facility

entities.name: Note
entities.notes: valeur /20 (0-20), coefficient, matiere, appreciation; FK eleve, periode

entities.name: ObservationMontessori
entities.notes: domaine(5) x niveau(4 acquisition); FK enfant, educateur

workflows.name: Bulletin
steps: classer moyennes de tous les élèves

workflows.name: Annonce multi-canal
steps: si Mattermost configuré: annoncer canal annonces

business_rules: IF user.facility != record.facility THEN accès refusé (404/queryset vide)
IF method not in SAFE_METHODS AND user not admin/coach of facility THEN 403
IF note.valeur < 0 OR > 20 THEN validation error
moyenne_generale = Σ(note·coefficient) / Σ(coefficient) sur la période
rang = position de l'élève dans les moyennes triées desc de l'établissement
EcheanceFrais.solde = montant_du - Σ paiements ; impayé IF solde > 0
WhatsApp hors fenêtre 24 h => seul un template pré-approuvé est envoyable
IF messagerie non configurée THEN 502 avec message propre (pas de secret)

dependencies.name: Django 3.2
dependencies.why: inherited from Kolibri; ORM, auth, admin, i18n

dependencies.name: requests
dependencies.why: HTTP client for Mattermost/Slack/WhatsApp (already core dep)

dependencies.name: Mattermost Team Edition (external)
dependencies.why: self-hosted Slack-like messaging, MIT, low footprint

coding_conventions: French domain names and docstrings; English for inherited Kolibri code
ecole models: UUID pk via UUIDPrimaryKeyModel, facility FK + timestamps via EtablissementScopedModel
DRF viewsets extend EcoleBaseViewSet for automatic facility scoping
No secrets in repo; all external config via KALANFA_* environment variables
External API clients are thin wrappers over requests with a MessagerieError/ConnecteurError boundary
Tests mock external HTTP; APITestCase with databases='__all__'; namespace 'kalanfa:kalanfa.plugins.ecole'

deployment.install: SETUPTOOLS_SCM_PRETEND_VERSION_FOR_KALANFA=0.1.0 pip install -e . --no-deps; deps from pyproject base group
deployment.frontend_build: pnpm install && pnpm build (venv Python active); npm aliases + browserslist packageExtension
deployment.provision: kalanfa manage provisiondevice --facility 'École MOUMA' --preset formal --language_id fr-fr
deployment.messaging: deployment/messagerie/docker-compose.yml (Mattermost + PostgreSQL, French default, closed teams)

roadmap.P0: Audit reproductible + gap analysis vs Kolibri 0.19.4
roadmap.P1: Cadrage documentaire (import Drive, transcription Montessori, matrice source->champs->écrans->exports)
roadmap.P2: Socle scolaire (année/classes/matières/inscriptions annuelles, imports, bulletins PDF versionnés, frais+audit)
roadmap.P4: Paiements Orange Money + SMS + déploiement pilote MOUMA

known_limitations: School modules are API-only; no Vue UI yet
No PDF generation for bulletins/receipts yet (WeasyPrint planned)
Parent portal specified (MASTER_PROMPT §7) but not implemented
ecole models are plain Django (not morango-synced) — offline sync of school data not yet wired
Mattermost and Kalanfa accounts are separate (no SSO in v1)
External integrations (Mattermost/Slack/WhatsApp) verified via mocks only, not against live services
technical_debt: Upstream telemetry (telemetry.learningequality.org) still active — neutralize in prod
Fork based on Kolibri develop branch, ahead of 0.19.4 — carries unreleased upstream changes (document in ADR-008)
Vendored built assets included in fork (large) — revisit for a clean build pipeline
createschool/provision commands print initial passwords to stdout — operational handling needed
No CI configured for the fork yet

engineering_decisions.decision: Fork Kolibri and rename kolibri->kalanfa wholesale
Reuse Kolibri Facility as SaaS tenant
Data layer in nested ordinary Django app to avoid dotted plugin app_label migration bug
